description: Opposition group social media enrichments. Merge by jurisdiction+state match. Researched 2026-03-02.

enrichments._notes: Facebook group 'No Data Centers in Jones County' founded by Dustin Riley, 2100+ members. Exact FB URL not confirmed via direct search; group name is 'No Data Centers in Jones County'.
Facebook page 'We the People of Wyco' run by Steve Sessions. Also Kansas Sierra Club Kanza Group active on this fight. Exact FB URL is approximate; search for 'We the People of Wyco' on Facebook.

Facebook page 'No Janesville Data Center' run by Cassandra Pope. SNOW (Southside Now) also active but appears to be neighborhood org, not solely anti-DC. Petition at change.org/p/no-janesville-data-center. Exact FB URL approximate.

Great Lakes Neighbors United (GLNU) is primary opposition group. Also 'Save Port Washington' website. GLNU has GoFundMe at gofundme.com/f/no-data-center-in-Ozaukee-County. Facebook page exists but exact URL not found via web search.
No Data Centers in the Driftless - grassroots campaign led by Pete Moris of Mount Hope. Plans for a webpage and Facebook page were announced but could not be confirmed as live yet.
Facebook group 'Coalition Against Data Centers in South Ohio' administered by Jay Kidd, 600+ members. Exact FB URL is approximate; search for the group name on Facebook.
Bi-State Datacenter Crisis Coalition. Facebook page confirmed from website scrape.
One Voice Martindale Brightwood. President: Cierra Johnson. 'Protect Martindale Brightwood' is the specific anti-data-center campaign name. One Voice is the umbrella neighborhood association.
Wake Up Jeffco founded by Lori Merriman, filed LLC to pursue litigation against city. No website or Facebook page confirmed via web search.

We Are Mason County KY. Director: Moran. Website confirmed. Facebook page confirmed from website scrape. Also a Change.org petition: change.org/p/save-mason-county-no-data-center-please-do-not-donate. Public and private FB groups maintained.

No Data Center FLX - opposing TeraWulf data center on Cayuga Lake. Also FLX Strong and CLEAN (Cayuga Lake Environmental Action Now) at cleancayugalake.org and facebook.com/CLEANCayugaLake/. FLX Strong and CLEAN filed lawsuit Jan 2026.
Deep South Center for Environmental Justice (DSCEJ). Founded 1992 by Dr. Beverly Wright. Declared firm opposition to New Orleans East data center Jan 2026. Also has Facebook presence.

Alabama Rivers Alliance - statewide network of 100+ groups. Working with GASP and Southern Environmental Law Center on Bessemer fight. Also Alabama NAACP State Conference and Metro Birmingham NAACP branch oppose the project.

GES Coalition (Globeville Elyria Swansea). Formed 2015. Also at ges-coalition.org. Opposing CoreSite DE3 data center at 4900 Race Street. City enacted moratorium on new data centers. Email: info@ges-coalition.org.
No Data Centers Hobart Indiana. Led by Angelita Soriano. 4000+ FB members. Change.org petition at change.org/p/stop-data-centers-in-hobart-indiana-protect-our-community. Lawsuit filed Dec 2025.
Already have: nodatacenterdeforest.com and facebook.com/groups/1140996281561878. No additional links found.
Already have stopthedatacenter.com. Also Facebook group 'Save Our City. Stop the Menomonie Data Center' with 8000+ members. Exact FB URL not confirmed.
No Desert Data Center Coalition. Motto: 'NOT. ONE. DROP.' Linktree at linktr.ee/nodesertdatacenter. Active since summer 2025 opposing Project Blue.
Livingston County Residents for Responsible Development (LCRRD). Opposed $1B Meta-backed data center. Developer withdrew Dec 2025 and township enacted 6-month moratorium.
No Data Centers in Spartanburg - Facebook group with nearly 3000 members. Started by Eric Allison. TigerDC withdrew Project Spero. Exact FB URL not confirmed.

Already have loudounclimate.org. Virginia Data Center Reform Coalition (50+ orgs) is active statewide. Piedmont Environmental Council info at pecva.org/region/regional-state-national-region/general-assembly/virginia-data-center-reform-coalition/.
Already have saveculpeper.com. No additional links found.

additional_national_organizations.name: NAACP - Environmental and Climate Justice
additional_national_organizations.notes: Released 'Stop Dirty Data' playbook 2026. Hosted national summit Dec 2025. Alabama State Conference NAACP and NJ NAACP chapters active in local fights.

additional_national_organizations.name: Kansas Sierra Club - Kanza Group
additional_national_organizations.notes: Active in Wyandotte County KS data center fight. Director Zack Pistora.

additional_national_organizations.name: Coalition for Responsible Data Center Development
additional_national_organizations.notes: Volunteer-driven 501c3/501c4. Provides 'Data Center Resistance 101 Toolkit'. Originally Minnesota-focused, now national.

additional_national_organizations.name: Virginia Data Center Reform Coalition
additional_national_organizations.notes: 50+ environmental, conservation, historic preservation groups. Formed Dec 2023. Includes Coalition to Protect Prince William County, Piedmont Environmental Council, Sierra Club, National Parks Conservation Assoc.

additional_national_organizations.name: Data Center Watch
additional_national_organizations.notes: Tracks opposition nationwide. Reports 188+ groups across 40+ states. Maintains database of activist activity.

additional_national_organizations.name: Cayuga Lake Environmental Action Now (CLEAN)
additional_national_organizations.notes: Co-plaintiff with FLX Strong in lawsuit against TeraWulf in Lansing NY.
